note: Banner sync follow-up: sost-explorer.html + sost-trinity.html aligned with the same Trinity narrative through sprint 5.40 already present on trinity-useful-compute.html (v264). v264 only updated the operator panel page; sost-explorer.html still showed 'Sprints 5.6 - 5.32 . 43 trinity scripts . 20 strict schemas . 1288 tests PASS' and the explorer's Trinity section stopped at the 5.19-5.32 banner, and sost-trinity.html still said '808+ trinity tests PASS' / '663/663 trinity tests PASS'. This bump fixes those staleness leaks. (A) sost-explorer.html: the inline headline summary now reads 'Sprints 5.6 - 5.40 . 48 trinity scripts . 27 strict schemas . 32 docs . 1518 tests PASS' and the closing 'post-5.18d stack (5.19 - 5.40)' sentence enumerates the full post-on-chain trajectory through release runner. (B) sost-explorer.html: a new banner card 'NEXT-LAYER OFF-CHAIN TOOLING . Sprints 5.33 - 5.40 (off-chain, dry-run)' has been inserted between the FIRST PAYMENT milestone and the One-line summary. The new card uses the cyan #7dd3fc accent (same as Sprint 5.36 dashboard surfacing) and contains an 8-row sprint table covering 5.33 result surfacing + 5.34 materials_project cache + 5.35 friendly worker onboarding + 5.36 dashboard surfacing + 5.37 external worker trial pack + 5.38 queue autopilot + 5.39 daily report + 5.40 sprint release runner, plus four side panels (autopilot pipeline, release-runner gates, const-true safety flags, hard caps), plus a 'What this stack is NOT' closing footnote that re-asserts zero on-chain capability, no wallet/sign/broadcast, no LLM, no network, and the on-chain edge unchanged from 5.18d. (C) sost-trinity.html line 584 'Status as of Sprint 5.18d' updated to 'Status as of Sprint 5.40' summarising the three off-chain extension tracks (5.19-5.32, 5.33-5.36, 5.37-5.40) and refreshing footprint to 48/27/32/1518 alongside the still-correct on-chain anchor at block #8512. (D) sost-trinity.html line 981 '663/663 trinity tests PASS' updated to '1518 trinity tests PASS (as of Sprint 5.40)'. Pure website edit. Zero src/, zero schemas, zero scripts, zero tests, zero consensus, zero wallet/payment/broadcast changes. Cross-worker compute_output_sha256 contract from Sprint 5.12 preserved end-to-end; v0.1 page invariants unchanged: no autopay, no wallet, no key on this page, no network calls from the panel. The on-chain stack stops where Sprint 5.18d left it; the new 5.33-5.40 banner explicitly re-states that everything described there is off-chain, dry-run, operator-side.
